# Siam Scuba

> PADI 5-Star dive center on Koh Tao, Thailand. Scuba diving courses (beginner to
> instructor), fun diving for certified divers, and try-diving experiences - run
> from two custom dive boats with a max 4:1 student-to-instructor ratio and
> flexible daily schedules. Booking and enquiries are handled over WhatsApp.

Languages: English (default), Hebrew (/he), Spanish (/es).
Location: Koh Tao, Surat Thani, Thailand. Main dive sites include Chumphon
Pinnacle, Sail Rock, and Twins.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://siamscuba.com/): Dive center overview, courses, boats, and reviews.
- [Dive sites](https://siamscuba.com/dive-sites): Guides to Koh Tao's dive sites.
- [Blog](https://siamscuba.com/blog): Diving guides and Koh Tao travel articles.
- [Fun dive booking](https://siamscuba.com/fun-dive-booking): Book fun dives for certified divers.

## Courses

- [Discover Scuba Diving](https://siamscuba.com/discover-scuba): One-day intro dive, no experience needed.
- [Open Water Diver](https://siamscuba.com/open-water): PADI entry-level certification.
- [Advanced Open Water](https://siamscuba.com/advanced-open-water): 5 adventure dives, depth to 30m.
- [Rescue Diver](https://siamscuba.com/rescue-diver): Emergency response and rescue skills.
- [Divemaster](https://siamscuba.com/divemaster): Professional-level internship.
- [IDC / Instructor](https://siamscuba.com/idc): PADI Instructor Development Course.
- [Specialties](https://siamscuba.com/deep-diving): Deep, Wreck, Night, Sidemount, DPV, Buoyancy, and more.

## Landing pages

- [Discover Scuba Diving](https://siamscuba.com/discover-scuba-diving)
- [Open Water Course](https://siamscuba.com/open-water-course)
- [Fun Dives](https://siamscuba.com/fun-dives)

## Contact

- WhatsApp: primary booking and enquiry channel (see site for current number).
- Website: https://siamscuba.com
